I'll swap in an SD1.5 checkpoint, resize the latent to 512×512, and look up the standard CLIP text encoder for the new workflow.
```batch
checkpointloadersimple.ckpt_name = 'v1-5-pruned-emaonly.safetensors'
emptylatentimage.width = 512
emptylatentimage.height = 512
search(focus_types=["CLIPTextEncode"])
```
